Class PObject

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.PObject
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Address, Blackboard, Company, Department, Document, DocumentGroup, DocumentInfo, MqttCommand, MqttCommandParameter, NameValueEntry, PActor, PermissionRecord, ProcessDefinition, Project, ProjectGoal, ProjectGoalProperty, ResourceGroup, Role, Skill, SkillCategory, SkillGroup, SkillRecord, SkillRecordProperty, Task, TaskSchedule, TelemetryRule
@MappedSuperclass public abstract class PObject extends Object implements Serializable
Base class for all persistent objects in the system. Provides the technical ID and ensures that all objects are serializable.
